title: attach documents from cloud in desktop app
excerpt: It would be great to be able to upload a Google Drive or any other cloud base file into the Files column on the Desktop app, this option is only supported by the browser version.

posts.author: JavieraRF (Javiera)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be great to be able to upload a Google Drive or any other cloud base file into the Files column on the Desktop app, this option is only supported by the browser version.
